evidence_catalog.claim: Loki enables object storage clients via storage_config.object_store when use-thanos-objstore is set.
Loki constructs object clients through NewObjectClient and bucket.NewObjectClient.
Tempo is cost-efficient and requires only object storage to operate.
Tempo trace.backend supports s3, azure, gcs, and local backends.
Mimir uses object storage for long-term durable metric storage.
Mimir bucket client supports s3, gcs, azure, swift, and filesystem backends.
